prerequisites: A Buzzsprout account with at least one podcast hosted on the platform.
Your Buzzsprout API token, retrieved from the my account section of your Buzzsprout admin at buzzsprout.com.
Your Buzzsprout podcast ID, which is the numeric identifier that appears in the API URL path (https://www.buzzsprout.com/api/<podcast_id>).
A start date to bound the earliest data the connector will replicate.

authMethods.name: API Token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: Buzzsprout uses token-based HTTP authentication. Supply your token in the api_key field. The connector sends it in the HTTP Authorization header using the form 'Authorization: Token token=<api_key>'. The token is retrieved from the my account section of your Buzzsprout admin at buzzsprout.com.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Buzzsprout and open the my account section of your admin at buzzsprout.com. Copy the API token shown there. This value is used for the connector's api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Find your podcast ID
setupSteps.body: Your podcast ID is the numeric identifier in the Buzzsprout API URL: https://www.buzzsprout.com/api/9999, where 9999 is the podcast identifier. Note this value for the podcast_id field.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter your token in api_key, your numeric podcast identifier in podcast_id, and set start_date to the earliest date from which the connector should replicate data. All three fields are required.
